title: Brand Visual DNA — OpenClaw v3.7
description: The contract that feeds the OpenClaw v3.7 prompt converter. Persists the brand-level and product-level placeholders the 15-block image prompt consumes. brief.* (from the generation request) and saudi.* (from the Cultural Spec library) are runtime fills and are NOT stored here. v3.7 philosophy: lock identity, open everything else; brand-derived colour; mood not spec. The v3.2 fixed-camera-spec fields (focal_length, key_fill_ratio, camera_angle, color_grade_lock, depth_of_field, sensor_look, signature_camera_move) are DELIBERATELY ABSENT — v3.7 makes those the model's creative choices. See ADR-0001-v37-visual-dna.

products.description: Per-product truth. The prompt is always about ONE product; the converter selects a product and fills product-level fields from its record, brand-level from the shared block. A product MAY override brand-level fields (palette/color_field_palette/capture_character/anti_attributes) when a sub-line differs (cold-mind catch).

confirmer.description: mohamed/client = GREEN; agent_derived = YELLOW; '' / pending = RED

statusField.description: A v3.7 placeholder value + its readiness. status drives the gap engine and the converter's fill-source tag. GREEN=client-confirmed (organ) · YELLOW=agent-derived candidate via the canon's own logic, RENDERABLE as a working default, NEVER silently promoted to confirmed (RABIE anti-hallucination law) · RED=client-only, cannot be inferred (exact hex, wordmark, deep identity); the reference image still carries identity so RED does not block rendering.

brandBlock.description: Shared across all the brand's products.

modesty_register.description: STRICT default (Saudi) — modest, no skin, no mixed-gender intimacy

background_tone.description: brand-owned backdrop tone; not clinical white unless the brand owns it

color_field_palette.description: NEW v3.7 — the brand-OWNED saturated colours usable as background/surface color-fields for chiaroscuro blocking. NEVER an accent borrowed from a reference image. Excludes any colour the brand does not own.

capture_character.description: aesthetic of capture, e.g. clean_studio / warm_lifestyle_film / film_grain_warmth

anti_attributes.description: things never to render (red lines + cultural + brand)

identity_dna.description: the locked identity preserved at any angle; the reference image teaches it. Wordmark, signature colour, form. Usually RED until client confirms.

material_texture.description: NEW v3.7 — material-truth for the real substrate (flexible film, glass, rigid carton, metal tin, fried-food crust...). How it behaves under light.

dimensions.description: NEW v3.7 — real-world size + a scale-anchor object, e.g. '≈10cm tall; a serving cup is ≈5-6cm, so product is ~1.5-2× cup height'.

companion_elements.description: NEW v3.7 — the product's 'world' of related objects + the restraint rule (one hero companion per scene).

label_text_arabic.description: exact Arabic wordmark — highest-risk identity element (canon hard-rule 9); verify every generation. Usually RED.

reference_images.description: RABIE catch — paths to CONFIRMED real photos of THIS product (clients/<h>/media/...). The flux-2-pro/edit identity anchor. Each carries provenance that it is verified to be this product, not a lookalike.

overrides.description: Optional per-product overrides of brand-level fields (cold-mind catch). Same shape as brandBlock fields. Absent = inherit brand.
